name: DigiSmart Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: Offer-led savings via promo code DIGISMART

exclusions: Fees and charges (including monthly fee and finance charges)
milestoneBenefits: Monthly fee of ₹49 is waived on spending ₹5,000 or more in the previous calendar month
additionalBenefits: 10% off at Blinkit (up to ₹1,000 off per month, maximum 5 transactions)
10% off at Zomato (up to ₹150 off per transaction, maximum 5 transactions per month)
20% off at Myntra (up to ₹700 off once per month)
Buy 1 Get 1 free movie ticket at INOX on weekends (up to ₹200 off per transaction, max 2 tickets per month)
15% cashback on Ola cab bookings (up to ₹600 cashback per month)
Yatra discounts on flight and hotel bookings (up to ₹10,000 off per transaction, once per quarter)

selfEmployed: Minimum annual income of ₹6,000,000 equivalent or subject to bank criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
This is a monthly fee card with a ₹49 monthly charge. The fee is waived if spends in the previous month reach ₹5,000.
All benefits are discount/cashback offers requiring the promo code DIGISMART on checkout.
No standard reward points or cashbacks are accumulated outside the partner offers.
